default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Airbyte and GrowthX to discuss content optimization strategies and next steps for SEO improvement.](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Recent content refreshes show mixed results: impressions up 5%, clicks down 20-27%](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [User experience improvements needed: better images, tables, CTAs, and overall design](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [New product launch in September (hybrid deployments) requires targeted content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [Technical SEO audit needed to identify and fix issues like last modification dates](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)

## Topics

### Content Refresh Results Analysis

  - [Initial 27% drop in clicks for first batch, 20% for second batch](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Impressions showing mixed results, flat to up 5%](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Overall traffic trend has been decreasing for months](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [No significant loss in keyword positions or SEMrush rankings](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [AI overviews potentially impacting organic search landscape](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)

### User Experience Enhancements

  - [Competitor (Hevo) analysis reveals need for better:](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
      - [Images (AI-generated possible)](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
      - [Product cards](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
      - [Tables (current implementation broken)](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
      - [CTAs (e.g., integration buttons, top picks modules)](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [GrowthX to improve image workflow and fix table issues](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [Airbyte team to implement new CTAs via Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)

### New Product Launch Strategy

  - [Hybrid deployment product launching in September](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [Need for extensive content around benefits of hybrid deployments](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [GrowthX to conduct keyword research and competitive analysis](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)

### Technical SEO Improvements

  - [Implement last modification tags for articles (currently missing in Webflow)](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)
  - [Audit for potential content cannibalization](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
  - [Consider cleaning up old, non-performing content](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
  - [Screaming Frog audit to ensure sound interlinking after refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)

### Content Creation Next Steps

  - [Continue with batch 4 of content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
  - [Start creating new content for regulated industries and data governance](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [Develop content strategy for new hybrid deployment product](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [GrowthX to assign new dedicated content team members](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to address image and table issues in refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [Airbyte to provide info on new product launch for content planning](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - [GrowthX to conduct technical SEO audit and provide recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
  - [Airbyte to implement new CTAs and design elements in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [GrowthX to send examples of inspiring design and CTA implementations](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
  - [Continue monitoring impression and traffic growth post-refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)
  - [GrowthX to introduce new content team members to Airbyte](https://fathom.video/share/2FS4n5trBi3jNa3TsB5rwHugBzsa_FmB?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)

action_items.description: Investigate table formatting issue in refreshed content, esp. example shared
Send info on new product launch (hybrid deployments) for content planning
Engage Dave for technical analysis, incl. last modification tag implementation
Intro new team members working on content to Airbyte team
Work w/ eng team to add images to refreshed content
Add CTAs from Webflow to refreshed content
Analyze Hevo design + other competitors; send examples for CTA/module inspiration
